title: Crispy Bitter Potato Stir-fry
description: This low-sodium-friendly dutch dish features crispy and comforting potatoes prepared with vegan butter for a comforting meal.

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp olive oil
ingredients.notes: can be replaced with another neutral-flavored oil for a low-sodium version

ingredients.name: 1/4 tsp salt
ingredients.notes: adjust to taste, can be omitted

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp vegan butter
ingredients.notes: ensure the vegan butter is low-sodium if available

instructions: Preheat your pressure cooker to high heat.
Wash and peel the potatoes. Cut them into bite-sized pieces.
Place the potato pieces in a pot with enough water to cover. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until tender, about 10-15 minutes or as per instructions for your pressure cooker.
Drain the cooked potatoes and set aside to cool slightly.
In the preheated pressure cooker, add olive oil, onion, garlic, salt (if using), and vegan butter. Stir-fry until onions are translucent.
Add the cooled potato pieces to the pressure cooker. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes or until potatoes are crispy but not falling apart.
Season with a pinch of salt if desired, and serve hot.
